summary: Completed frontend testing for user-uploaded deck images integration. Verified both React live preview and static GitHub Pages site display the two new deck images (deck-before.jpg and deck-after-2.jpg) correctly in the before/after gallery with proper captions and labels. All images load successfully with HTTP 200 OK status.
passed_tests: React live preview loads without runtime errors
Card 3 displays deck-before.jpg with 'Before' label and 'Deck before cleaning' caption
Card 4 displays deck-after-2.jpg with 'After' label and 'Deck after cleaning' caption
All 4 gallery images load successfully (verified natural width > 0)
React app serves /assets/deck-before.jpg with HTTP 200 OK (3.0MB)
React app serves /assets/deck-after-2.jpg with HTTP 200 OK (724KB)
Static site index.html references correct deck image paths
Static site serves assets/deck-before.jpg with HTTP 200 OK
Static site serves assets/deck-after-2.jpg with HTTP 200 OK
All book buttons point to correct Google Form URL (https://forms.gle/11TXTAgdrrRsnP749)
Found 4 book buttons across hero, footer, and mobile sections
Page functionality and navigation remain intact
